parameters.query: (SELECT platform, week_start, week_end, raw_data, ai_report FROM ads_reports WHERE platform = 'google_ads' ORDER BY week_start DESC LIMIT 8) UNION ALL (SELECT platform, week_start, week_end, raw_data, ai_report FROM ads_reports WHERE platform = 'meta_ads' ORDER BY week_start DESC LIMIT 8) ORDER BY week_start DESC;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify($json.isIm ? { channel: $json.channel, text: $json.text } : { channel: $json.channel, thread_ts: $json.thread_ts, reply_broadcast: true, text: $json.text }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify($json.isIm ? { channel: $json.channel, text: $json.text } : { channel: $json.channel, thread_ts: $json.thread_ts, reply_broadcast: true, text: $json.text }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify($json.isIm ? { channel: $json.channel, text: $json.errorMessage } : { channel: $json.channel, thread_ts: $json.thread_ts, reply_broadcast: true, text: $json.errorMessage }) }}
